overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic video game showing a character in a long coat and hat exploring a snowy mountainous wilderness at night. The character transitions from kneeling in grass to walking through meadows and ascending rocky terrain, eventually reaching a ridge overlooking a distant valley settlement with scattered lights.

events.description: character begins in a crouched position examining the ground
character stands up and begins walking forward

agents.ego_description: crouched down examining the snowy grass, then stands up and begins walking forward

entered.detail: patchy snow covering the ground grass
tall wild grass with snow patches
large flat-topped rock formations in the distance
weathered wooden fence posts along the path

segments.scene_description: The scene opens with a character crouched in a snowy grassland at night, examining the ground. The character then stands and begins walking through the clearing, with distant mesa formations visible against the dark blue sky and a wooden fence running along the right side.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the grassy meadow toward the mountain formations

entered.detail: clusters of small white flowers scattered in the grass
massive rock formation rising from the terrain

segments.scene_description: The character walks through an open meadow blanketed with snow and white wildflowers, heading toward large rock formations in the distance. The wooden fence falls behind as the character progresses deeper into the wilderness, with the mesa formations shifting to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky mountain slope with valley view

events.description: ground surface changes from grass to snow-covered rock
valley settlement with lights becomes visible in the distance

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky slope, navigating from grassy terrain to snow-covered stone

entered.detail: steep rocky terrain covered in snow
leafless twisted tree on the hillside
cluster of buildings with warm lights in the valley below

segments.scene_description: The terrain shifts to snow-covered rock as the character ascends the mountain slope. A dead scrub tree stands on the left while the grass and flowers fall behind. As the character climbs higher, a valley settlement with scattered lights becomes visible in the distance below.

events.description: character jumps down from a small rocky ledge

agents.ego_description: walking along the rocky ridge line overlooking the distant valley settlement

entered.detail: steep drop-off edge of the ridge
trail winding through the valley below

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the snow-covered mountain ridge, jumping down a small ledge and proceeding along the edge. The valley settlement remains visible in the distance with its lights twinkling below, while the ridge edge falls away to the right and a winding path becomes visible in the valley floor.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character travels from a low-lying snowy grassland up to a high mountain ridge overlooking a distant settlement. It begins with the character crouched in the snow examining the ground before standing to walk past a wooden fence toward distant mesa formations under a dark blue night sky. As the character progresses deeper into the wilderness, the fence recedes and the terrain opens into a wide meadow blanketed in snow and white wildflowers. The scene then shifts from soft flora to rugged, snow-covered rock as the character ascends a mountain slope past a dead scrub tree, gradually revealing a valley settlement with twinkling lights below. Finally, the camera follows the character along the snowy ridge, jumping down a small ledge to overlook a winding path on the valley floor.
